title: Eldertree Village
description: Forest-edge village with dying sacred trees. Forest Keeper Anya watches the corruption spread. A refugee from Scriptura speaks of something that measures, something that calibrates. Old Fen sells herbs that heal in the correct direction.

steps.text: Eldertree sat at the forest's edge like a village holding its breath. The trees behind it leaned wrong — not from wind, but from something internal, as though the forest itself were flinching.

lines.speaker: Forest Keeper Anya
lines.text: The trees are dying. Not the way trees die — slowly, seasonally, with the dignity of something that's had its time. They're dying from the inside. The sap runs black. The leaves fall upward.

lines.speaker: Forest Keeper Anya
lines.text: It comes from the east. From the capital's direction. We sent word. No one came.

lines.speaker: Forest Keeper Anya
lines.text: If you're heading through the forest — the corruption is thickest near the center. There's something in there. Something that was put there deliberately. The trees told me that much before they stopped talking.

lines.speaker: Scriptura Refugee
lines.text: I came from Scriptura. The capital. Don't go there. Don't — listen, don't go there.

lines.speaker: Scriptura Refugee
lines.text: The chancellor has something in the tower. Not a weapon. Not a monster. Something that measures. It watches the whole kingdom and it measures what it sees and it adjusts things based on what it measures.

lines.speaker: Scriptura Refugee
lines.text: I worked in the filing office. I saw the reports. The cave creatures, the forest corruption, the trade routes closing — none of it is random. It's all calibrated. Someone is tuning the difficulty of this kingdom like it's a test.

lines.speaker: Scriptura Refugee
lines.text: The reports were filed under a name I'd never seen. Not the chancellor's name. Something else. Something that started with C.

lines.speaker: Old Fen
lines.text: The corruption changes the plants. Not just kills them — changes them. I found a healing herb yesterday that heals backwards. Took damage to use it. Fascinating, in a deeply upsetting way.

lines.speaker: Old Fen
lines.text: I can sell you proper remedies. The kind that heal in the correct direction. You'll want them for the deep forest.
